diagrams.title: Merge Sort Recursion Tree
diagrams.description: Shows how the array is divided recursively and then merged back
diagrams.purpose: Visualize divide and conquer pattern and understand log n levels

diagrams.title: Merge Operation Process
diagrams.description: Two pointer technique for combining sorted subarrays
diagrams.purpose: Understand how merge step works element by element

diagrams.title: Time Complexity Breakdown
diagrams.description: Work done at each level of recursion tree
elements: Level 1: 2 merges of n/2 each = n
Level 2: 4 merges of n/4 each = n
All levels: n work × log n levels = n log n
diagrams.purpose: Visual proof of O(n log n) time complexity
